text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hype generated by the Sprinters S. reaches
an unexpected fever pitch and draws tons of
people to the racetrack today..

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is hyped up too. So much so that
she's packed a huge lunch for the occasion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Except she's already had lunch for today! After
deciding to save it for dinner, she gears up for the
Mile Ch.!
